scripts.dev: sh -c 'bun --cwd apps/api dev & api=$!; trap "kill $api 2>/dev/null" EXIT INT TERM; bun --cwd apps/web dev'
scripts.dev:full: sh -c '~/.foundry/bin/anvil --silent & anvil=$!; sleep 2; DEPLOYER_PRIVATE_KEY=0xac0974bec39a17e36ba4a6b4d238ff944bacb478cbed5efcae784d7bf4f2ff80 ~/.foundry/bin/forge script script/Deploy.s.sol --broadcast --rpc-url http://localhost:8545 2>&1 | tail -3; ~/.foundry/bin/cast send 0x5FbDB2315678afecb367f032d93F642f64180aa3 "addCollector(address)" 0x70997970C51812dc3A010C7d01b50e0d17dc79C8 --private-key 0xac0974bec39a17e36ba4a6b4d238ff944bacb478cbed5efcae784d7bf4f2ff80 --rpc-url http://localhost:8545 2>&1 | tail -1; sleep 1; bun --cwd apps/api dev & api=$!; bun --cwd apps/agents dev & collector=$!; bun --cwd apps/agents dev:compliance & compliance=$!; trap "kill $anvil $api $collector $compliance 2>/dev/null" EXIT INT TERM; bun --cwd apps/web dev'
scripts.test: bun test apps/api apps/agents packages apps/contracts
